summary: Phase 8 refactor regression testing complete. Backend: 18/18 pytest tests passed (100%) in /app/backend/tests/test_phase8.py covering (a) refactored /admin/analytics with single $aggregate + asyncio.gather - all 4 ranges (7/14/30/90 days) return correct shape (series, by_category, by_status, gmv, platform_revenue, lead_fees, avg_job_value, disputes, top_specialists) AND complete in <2s including a full 90d run (entire 18-test suite ran in 4.27s vs 5s in iteration_5); (b) lead_fees is now windowed - days=7 lead_fees <= days=90 lead_fees confirmed; (c) revenue formula gmv*0.05 + lead_fees holds; (d) /admin/disputes enriched batched lookups present (client_name, specialist_name, request_title, escrow_amount); (e) /operator/twins enriched batched lookups present (property_name, property_address, owner_name, property_surface); (f) service_categories validation: invalid_xyz -> 400 'Categorii invalide', mixed-invalid -> 400, valid lowercase ['hvac','electric','plumbing'] -> 200 and persisted via /auth/me; (g) Rate-limit 429 after 8 attempts on localhost still works with Romanian 'Prea multe încercări' message; (h) Stripe DEMO checkout-session returns cs_demo_* session_id with session_id embedded in checkout_url, /payments/status returns paid+demo_mode=true. Frontend: All 4 role dashboards render correctly after the Dashboards.jsx → 5-file split (DashShared, ClientDashboard 337L, SpecialistDashboard 132L, AdminDashboard 177L, OperatorDashboard 114L + 5-line barrel). ClientDashboard: property card + 2D floorplan + 4 stats (90/100 health, 5300 RON wallet, 3520 tokens, 14 requests) + search/filter + new-request-btn + dispute-confirmed item with rating modal triggered. SpecialistDashboard: VERIFIED badge, 1388 RON, 4.9★, 2 active jobs, Oportunități Noi list with 6 'Acceptă (45 RON)' buttons, Lucrările Mele with Marchează completă + dispute icon, Documentele mele button. AdminDashboard: all 4 tabs found (admin-tab-overview/analytics/specialists/disputes), Analytics tab shows 4 KPI cards + Activity chart (recharts area chart, 3 chart wrappers) + 4 range pills + refresh icon; Disputes tab shows 'Dispute deschise (0)' + 'Istoric rezolvate (2)' with TEST_phase5 + Test dispută. OperatorDashboard: 1 twin card clickable → twin editor 2D floorplan opens with 5 rooms (Living 32m², Dormitor, Bucătărie, Baie, Hol) + asset list + + Camera/+ Asset/ Salvează ciornă buttons. Register: 10 specialty grid buttons + 14 zone buttons (frontend code defines 13 ZONES + 1 outlier with zone- prefix - acceptable), role-specialist toggles specialty grid on, role-client hides it - all working.

minor.issue: top_specialists pipeline returns _id as the raw specialist_id string and queries db.users with ObjectId({_id}) - works correctly today because the column is stored as ObjectId, but if any legacy row has a string specialist_id the lookup would miss silently. Consider try/except around ObjectId(t['_id']).
Rate-limit counter still increments BEFORE password check (carried from phase 7) - successful logins still count toward 8/min limit. Pre-existing minor.

If role=specialist and both service_categories and specialty are omitted, request succeeds with empty service_categories array - no 400. Acceptable since frontend enforces, but server should also require non-empty service_categories when role=specialist.

issues: Zone selector renders 14 buttons matching [data-testid^='zone-'] but ZONES array only declares 13 entries - inspect for a stray testid collision (likely a non-zone button using zone- prefix, harmless but worth a quick rename).

action_items: Optional: server-side require non-empty service_categories for role=specialist (currently allows []).
Optional: enforce only-count-failed-attempts for /auth/login rate limiter (pre-existing minor).
Optional: rename any non-zone button that matches data-testid^='zone-' on Register page so the count is exactly 13.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactor is clean: Dashboards.jsx → 5-line barrel + 4 focused files (largest is ClientDashboard at 337 lines, all well under 700-line guideline).

/admin/analytics now uses a single asyncio.gather across 7 awaitables (cat agg, status agg, confirmed find, leads count, 3 dispute counts) plus per-day series via a separate aggregation - massive improvement vs prior 4*N sequential queries.
lead_fees windowing fix is correct: count_documents({specialist_id: {$ne: null}, assigned_at: {$gte: start_iso}}) - matches spec.
ALLOWED_SPECIALTIES is a Python set (O(1) membership) and is the single source of truth for validation - good.
DEMO_STRIPE expression cleaned: (STRIPE_KEY == 'sk_test_emergent') or (not STRIPE_KEY.startswith(('sk_test_', 'sk_live_'))). Much clearer than iteration_5 chain. ✓
server.py still at 2472 lines - splitting into routers/ remains a phase-9 candidate.
Top-specialists lookup batched via {$in: spec_ids} - N+1 eliminated in this hot path. ✓

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all 4 dashboards render and interact correctly post-refactor (Client/Specialist/Admin 4-tabs + Operator 2D twin editor). Register page renders 10 specialties + zone grid as expected. Role toggle (specialist↔client) hides/shows specialty grid correctly.

test_credentials: admin@propmanage.io/Admin123!, client@propmanage.io/Client123!, specialist@propmanage.io/Spec123!, operator@propmanage.io/Op123! - all confirmed working. test_phase8.py adds per-run: 2 TEST_phase8_* specialists (good + mixed-invalid attempt) + 1 funded request 'TEST_phase8 demo stripe' on client@.
seed_data_creation: test_phase8.py creates: TEST_phase8_ok_<uuid>, TEST_phase8_bad_<uuid> (400'd, never persists), TEST_phase8_mix_<uuid> (400'd), one funded request on client@propmanage.io via DEMO Stripe.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 8 refactor is fully green. server.py /admin/analytics is fast (single asyncio.gather + per-day series agg). The 5-file dashboard split is backward-compatible via Dashboards.jsx barrel re-export so App.js imports were not touched. ALLOWED_SPECIALTIES contains lowercase keys only (hvac/electric/plumbing/interior_design/carpentry/painting/cleaning/appliance_repair/gardening/other) - any old test sending 'HVAC' or 'Electric' (capitalized) will now 400. Phase 7's test_phase7.py::TestRegistration::test_register_specialist_with_categories_and_zones uses uppercase and will fail under the new validator - leave it as a known-stale phase-7 test or update to lowercase. Stripe DEMO mode still active (STRIPE_API_KEY=sk_test_emergent). The 1 dispute and 2 resolved disputes in the admin Disputes tab are intentional fixtures from earlier phases.
rca of the issue: No bugs found in the Phase 8 refactor. All previously-implemented features (Phases 1-7) still pass under the refactored dashboards + optimized analytics. The minor backend issues listed are pre-existing minor concerns carried over from phase 7 (no new regressions). Performance: full test suite (18 tests including 4 analytics ranges + 1 stripe roundtrip + 1 rate-limit ladder) completes in 4.27 seconds, ≈ flat vs phase 7 which had 22 tests in ~5s, but the per-call analytics is provably faster (each days=90 call now <2s vs prior ~360 sequential queries).
